political.s: No FEC PAC contributions on record.

wiki.extract: Coach New York, commonly known as Coach, is an American fashion house headquartered in New York City specializing in handbags, luggage, and accessories, as well as ready-to-wear. Coach licenses its name and branding to Luxottica for eyewear, and Paris-based Interparfums for fragrances. Stuart Vevers has been the executive creative director since June 2013.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was walking in the bus yard when he slipped on ice and fell to the ground, fracturing his arm.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by rolling powered vehicle or machinery
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee had just left a bus and was going toward their own vehicle when the bus rolled forward. The employee was pinned between the bus and their own vehicle and suffered a broken pelvis.

sampleRecords.part_of_body: Chest, except internal location of diseases or disorders
sampleRecords.event_description: Nonroadway collision with object other than vehicle, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On October 25, 2023, an employee was in the warehouse driving a forklift toward the dock door. The forklift struck a conveyor belt and the employee sustained broken ribs.

sampleRecords.nature: Major tears to muscles, tendons, ligaments
sampleRecords.event_description: Compressed or pinched by shifting objects or equipment
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was on a road call, changing a tire on a bus. When the jack was lowered, the employee's arm was caught between the frame of the bus and a block of wood on the ground, resulting in a muscle detachment in their left arm.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck against moving part of machinery or equipment
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On June 6, 2023, an employee was operating a table saw to cut a 2x12 piece of wood. The wood kicked back, causing the employee to suffer an amputation to the left hand.
